name: Bind

documentation.description: Proxy for the binding. The proxy declares the binding definition that links the name to the function and it implements the necessary object conversion to translate the Readonly_Bean object to the target object type.

constants.name: Proxy

subprograms.name: Method_Access
subprograms.code:
procedure Method_Access (O  : access Util.Beans.Basic.Readonly_Bean'Class;
                         P1 : in Param1_Type)

formals.name: Bean
formals.code: type Bean is abstract limited new Util.Beans.Basic.Readonly_Bean with private;

formals.name: Method
formals.code:
procedure Method (O  : in out Bean;
                  P1 : in Param1_Type)
